programme.title: The AFN Fishing Show
programme.sub-title: Arnham Land Barra & Rubicon River Tr
programme.desc: Bill Travels all the way to Arnhem Land Barramundi Lodge to interview Aussie Fishing Icon, Alex Julius. Then Jason Taylor explores a cool trout river just south of Lake Eildon.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: It has been a magnificent 15 seasons of Fishing Addiction, so we thought, why not celebrate it and take a look back at some of our most iconic moments?

programme.title: Charter Boat Wars 2: Port Phillip Bay
programme.desc: Skippers navigate challenging conditions and go head-to-head in competition on the open water, testing skill and resilience.

programme.title: AFL Pre-Game
programme.desc: A look ahead at this afternoon's AFL game.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Swans collide with the Demons, live and free from the SCG. Bounce time: 3:15 pm AEST.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: A pleasant American jumps the gun when he decides to go on a quick day-trip. A cheerful traveller's trip is in the bag. A baggage search turns cheesy.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Officers discover a traveller has been on a lengthy trip abroad for a reason. Honesty is the best policy, even for an ex-con. An Alaskan-bound couple sticks to their guns.

programme.title: AFL
programme.desc: The Suns take on the Giants, live and free from People First Stadium. Bounce time: 7:20 pm AEST.

programme.title: Die Hard With A Vengeance
programme.desc: Third in the series of high-speed thrillers about maverick New York cop John McClane. This time the death-defying lawman, under suspension from the force, goes up against a madman who is threatening to detonate bombs all over Manhattan. McClane pulls out all the stops as he races against the clock to save the city. En route, a hostile Harlem shopkeeper becomes his reluctant partner in the adventure.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's reluctance to completely restore a customer's 1973 Chevy Blazer ultimately changes after he learns the reason the owner wants it done; the owner of a haunted hotel in New Orleans wants a custom bike with a frightening theme.

programme.title: Blokesworld
programme.desc: Ado and Camera 3 travel the world to prove that Blokes are the same all over the world and they all share the same passions.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: A pleasant American jumps the gun when he decides to go on a quick day-trip. A cheerful traveller's trip is in the bag. A baggage search turns cheesy.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Officers discover a traveller has been on a lengthy trip abroad for a reason. Honesty is the best policy, even for an ex-con. An Alaskan-bound couple sticks to their guns.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of our Immigration, Customs, and Quarantine departments.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A UK girl travelling back from New Zealand on a tourist visa is questioned by Immigration. Two Japanese tourists returning home are suspected of wildlife smuggling, and a positive test result for cocaine on a passenger leads to a formal interview, a Federal Police investigation, and a trip to the local hospital. Hosted by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: An English tourist's life with her boyfriend in Australia hangs in the balance. The Australian Customs Vessel intercepts an illegal fishing boat.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: Rob and Adam test the Yellow Head Moray Eel for possible venom effects, but must resort to a risky, bloody bite. But venom is not the issue for their next animal: the Electric Eel. The results are positively shocking.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: The AFN Fishing Show
programme.sub-title: Arnham Land Barra & Rubicon River Tr
programme.desc: Bill Travels all the way to Arnhem Land Barramundi Lodge to interview Aussie Fishing Icon, Alex Julius. Then Jason Taylor explores a cool trout river just south of Lake Eildon.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's reluctance to completely restore a customer's 1973 Chevy Blazer ultimately changes after he learns the reason the owner wants it done; the owner of a haunted hotel in New Orleans wants a custom bike with a frightening theme.

programme.title: Mt. Hutt Rescue
programme.desc: A hit and run collision triggers an evacuation but wild weather cuts off access to the mountain. A heart transplant miracle boy faces another medical emergency & Med Dog Boots faces a big cancer scare.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: A pleasant American jumps the gun when he decides to go on a quick day-trip. A cheerful traveller's trip is in the bag. A baggage search turns cheesy.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Officers discover a traveller has been on a lengthy trip abroad for a reason. Honesty is the best policy, even for an ex-con. An Alaskan-bound couple sticks to their guns.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of our Immigration, Customs, and Quarantine departments.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: A UK girl travelling back from New Zealand on a tourist visa is questioned by Immigration. Two Japanese tourists returning home are suspected of wildlife smuggling, and a positive test result for cocaine on a passenger leads to a formal interview, a Federal Police investigation, and a trip to the local hospital. Hosted by Grant Bowler.

programme.title: Border Security - Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Officers make a disturbing discovery in a Chinese student's bag which is so cruel, they just can't \.

programme.title: My Road To Adventure
programme.desc: Cam Sinclair, one of Australia’s all-time freestyle motocross greats, returns to Phillip Island, Victoria with family and friends to revisit his roots travelling in his Jayco Basestation, Pt. 2.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny's reluctance to completely restore a customer's 1973 Chevy Blazer ultimately changes after he learns the reason the owner wants it done; the owner of a haunted hotel in New Orleans wants a custom bike with a frightening theme.

programme.title: Rides Down Under: Workshop Wars
programme.desc: We've assembled teams from the best of Australia's car building and car tuning workshops. Our teams lead the way in modification, in the search to see who will be crowned the nation's best workshop.

programme.title: Night Thunder
programme.desc: Night Thunder's high-speed thrills and intense racing action from Perth Motorplex, live and free, streaming on 7plus.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty becomes stranded while in the Revelation Mountains and has only one final chance to safely arrive back home; Kyle and Ben attempt to coordinate a nighttime stakeout in the hopes of being able to stop a certain predator.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Pawn Star Chumlee rolls into the shop with a 1950's Murray pedal car and a specific vision for how he wants it restored. And later the crew works to fix up a 1965 Honda Superhawk.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit
programme.desc: It’s a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi & Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys reckon petroliana is plentiful in the Lone Star State, but tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole proves much trickier than expected.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programme.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?

programme.title: The Agenda Setters: Rugby League
programme.desc: Corey Parker leads The Agenda Setters: Rugby League with an all-star panel, delivering sharp analysis and breaking news.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: After Marko's sudden exit, the Dirt Dogs feel sabotaged but fight back with big tech and bigger gold. Meanwhile, Rick launches a rescue mission for a rookie prospector.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Donnie confronts poachers, who appear to be stealing gold from his lease, and a disaster dam-wall break threatens to end all hope of repaying their investor on time. Dennis and his team launch a surprise raid on a neighbouring gold mine. The Rookie Miners test the boundaries of their friendship with mates, Donnie and Leigh. Gold Sniper Rob is desperate to break his 1.7-gram gold nugget record.

programme.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage head out on a mission that is running to a strict time constraint and difficult budget circumstances.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The crew of luxurious cruise liner Le Boreal braves ferocious weather conditions in Antarctica during its maiden voyage.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit
programme.desc: It’s a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi & Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys reckon petroliana is plentiful in the Lone Star State, but tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole proves much trickier than expected.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programme.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?

programme.title: Aussie Salvage Squad
programme.desc: At a marine sanctuary in the far Northern Territory, Team Salvage must overcome a mechanical catastrophe to recover a beached 7-ton Catamaran.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew hunt a remote mountain pass, a gold drought puts huge pressure on Jacqui and Andrew, Levi and Bridget are left to hunt alone, and the Ferals hunt in the extreme Pilbara region.

programme.title: Kings Of Pain
programme.desc: It's America vs. Australia in a battle royale of pain administered by sharks. But after getting stung by both, Adam and Rob realise that when their countries win, they lose.

programme.title: Mark Berg's Fishing Addiction
programme.desc: Fishing expert Mark Berg visits some of the best fishing destinations around. Chasing a wide variety of fish, Mark is always hoping to capture a new species or develop a new technique.

programme.title: Merv Hughes Fishing
programme.desc: This is a light-hearted fishing show with some ripping catches, a few mostly true yarns, mateship and, of course, a splash of comedy thrown in.

programme.title: Creek To Coast
programme.desc: We're on the fairway with Lions favourite, Cam Rayner. Braving the rain for a flathead bonanza. Australia's best Hipcamp and cooking up the crispiest campfire potatoes you've ever tasted.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The crew of luxurious cruise liner Le Boreal braves ferocious weather conditions in Antarctica during its maiden voyage.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Troy and his crew return to the Louisiana swamps to extract the valuable treasure trove of old-growth cypress logs they discovered last season. Determined to capitalize on a rare spell of high water, Troy, Pickle, and veteran swamper Timmy Aucoin follow a storied map to relocate the prized wood. Then using Timmy’s specialized boat called the “log dog,” and every ounce of swamp ingenuity they can muster, the team attempts to secure a payday for the ages.

programme.title: Australia ReDiscovered
programme.desc: Join Ricko as he heads to Townsville to rediscover its wartime secrets before heading into the scrub to get to the bottom of an age-old mystery, and he also tells the tale of a legendary shearer!

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Pawn Star Chumlee rolls into the shop with a 1950's Murray pedal car and a specific vision for how he wants it restored. And later the crew works to fix up a 1965 Honda Superhawk.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Cloudy With A Chance Of Profit
programme.desc: It’s a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi & Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys reckon petroliana is plentiful in the Lone Star State, but tracking down a Texas-sized honey hole proves much trickier than expected.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.sub-title: Best Of - Don't Judge A Pawn By Its
programme.desc: Will an 1842 Book of Mormon make Rick a believer? Will he wait for winter to come for a limited edition signed Game of Thrones, or be sucked in by P.T. Barnum's tell-all tale?

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew hunt a remote mountain pass, a gold drought puts huge pressure on Jacqui and Andrew, Levi and Bridget are left to hunt alone, and the Ferals hunt in the extreme Pilbara region.
